message:
Fix TypeScript errors and enhance mobile gestures

- Fix TypeScript transition type issues in CharacterReveal and ScrollReveal
- Add proper MotionValue type import in PullToRefresh
- Enhance SwipeablePromptCard with double-tap save and long-press menu
- Add heart animation for double-tap favorite gesture
- Add iOS-style quick actions bottom sheet on long-press

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
